languages.text: {n}Недоверие гвардейца быстро сменяется подозрением. Проходит совсем немного времени, прежде чем он испрашивает по вокс-передатчику у Себериана, как поступить с вашим непомерным любопытством. Лорд-капитан не склонен терпеть незнакомца, проявляющего столь пристальный интерес к его любимой игрушке. Следует приказ, гремят выстрелы — и вас вновь поглощает небытие.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Недоверие гвардейца быстро сменяется подозрением. Проходит совсем немного времени, прежде чем он испрашивает по вокс-передатчику у Себериана, как поступить с вашим непомерным любопытством. Лорд-капитан не склонен терпеть незнакомца, проявляющего столь пристальный интерес к его любимой игрушке. Следует приказ, гремят выстрелы — и вас вновь поглощает небытие.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The guard's distrust is quickly replaced by suspicion. Within moments, he is asking Seberian over the vox-caster what to do about your inordinate curiosity. The Lord Captain is not inclined to tolerate a stranger showing such keen interest in his favourite toy. Orders are given, shots are fired, and you are swallowed by oblivion once more.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Недоверие гвардейца быстро сменяется подозрением. languages.text: {n}守卫的怀疑很快变成警觉。很快，他就用通讯器请示塞贝里安，该如何处理你那过度的好奇心。舰长大人可容不得一个陌生人对他心爱的宝贝如此上心。命令下达，枪声响起，你再次被遗忘的深渊吞没。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard's distrust is quickly replaced by suspicion. Within moments, he is asking Seberian over the vox-caster what to do about your inordinate curiosity. The Lord Captain is not inclined to tolerate a stranger showing such keen interest in his favourite toy. Orders are given, shots are fired, and you are swallowed by oblivion once more.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}守卫的怀疑很快变成警觉。很快，他就用通讯器请示塞贝里安，该如何处理你那过度的好奇心。舰长大人可容不得一个陌生人对他心爱的宝贝如此上心。命令下达，枪声响起，你再次被遗忘的深渊吞没。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La méfiance du garde laisse rapidement place à des soupçons. Quelques instants plus tard, il appelle Seberian pour lui demander quoi faire de vous et de votre curiosité excessive. Le seigneur-capitaine n'apprécie guère qu'{mf|un inconnu|une inconnue} accorde un tel intérêt à son jouet préféré. L'ordre est donné, des coups de feu retentissent et le néant vous engloutit une fois de plus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard's distrust is quickly replaced by suspicion. Within moments, he is asking Seberian over the vox-caster what to do about your inordinate curiosity. The Lord Captain is not inclined to tolerate a stranger showing such keen interest in his favourite toy. Orders are given, shots are fired, and you are swallowed by oblivion once more.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La méfiance du garde laisse rapidement place à des soupçons. Quelques instants plus tard, il appelle Seberian pour lui demander quoi faire de vous et de votre curiosité excessive. Le seigneur-capitaine n'apprécie guère qu'{mf|un inconnu|une inconnue} accorde un tel intérêt à son jouet préféré. L'ordre est donné, des coups de feu retentissent et le néant vous engloutit une fois de plus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Muhafızın güvensizliği, çabucak yerini şüpheye bırakıyor. Saniyeler sonra voksyayardan Seberian'a bu aşırı merakın hakkında voks üzerinden ne yapmaları gerektiğini soruyorlar. Lord Kaptan, bir yabancının en sevdiği oyuncağa böylesine keskin bir ilgi göstermesine tahammül etmiyor. Emirler veriliyor, ateş ediliyor ve sen bir kez daha hiçlik tarafından yutuluyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard's distrust is quickly replaced by suspicion. Within moments, he is asking Seberian over the vox-caster what to do about your inordinate curiosity. The Lord Captain is not inclined to tolerate a stranger showing such keen interest in his favourite toy. Orders are given, shots are fired, and you are swallowed by oblivion once more.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Muhafızın güvensizliği, çabucak yerini şüpheye bırakıyor. Saniyeler sonra voksyayardan Seberian'a bu aşırı merakın hakkında voks üzerinden ne yapmaları gerektiğini soruyorlar. Lord Kaptan, bir yabancının en sevdiği oyuncağa böylesine keskin bir ilgi göstermesine tahammül etmiyor. Emirler veriliyor, ateş ediliyor ve sen bir kez daha hiçlik tarafından yutuluyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La desconfianza del guardia no tarda en convertirse en sospecha. Al momento, pregunta a Seberian por voco qué hacer con tu peculiar curiosidad. El Lord Capitán no está dispuesto a tolerar que un{mf||a} desconocid{mf|o|a} tenga tanto interés por su juguete favorito. Da sus órdenes, los guardias disparan y vuelve a consumirte el olvido.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard's distrust is quickly replaced by suspicion. Within moments, he is asking Seberian over the vox-caster what to do about your inordinate curiosity. The Lord Captain is not inclined to tolerate a stranger showing such keen interest in his favourite toy. Orders are given, shots are fired, and you are swallowed by oblivion once more.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La desconfianza del guardia no tarda en convertirse en sospecha. Al momento, pregunta a Seberian por voco qué hacer con tu peculiar curiosidad. El Lord Capitán no está dispuesto a tolerar que un{mf||a} desconocid{mf|o|a} tenga tanto interés por su juguete favorito. Da sus órdenes, los guardias disparan y vuelve a consumirte el olvido.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Argwohn der Wachen weicht rasch offenem Misstrauen. Kurz darauf fragt er Seberian über den Vox-Transmitter, was er angesichts deiner Neugier unternehmen soll. Der Lord Captain ist nicht geneigt, das lebhafte Interesse {mf|eines|einer} Fremden an seinem Lieblingsspielzeug zu tolerieren. Es werden Befehle erteilt, Schüsse abgefeuert und du wirst einmal mehr von der Vergessenheit verschlungen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard's distrust is quickly replaced by suspicion. Within moments, he is asking Seberian over the vox-caster what to do about your inordinate curiosity. The Lord Captain is not inclined to tolerate a stranger showing such keen interest in his favourite toy. Orders are given, shots are fired, and you are swallowed by oblivion once more.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Argwohn der Wachen weicht rasch offenem Misstrauen. Kurz darauf fragt er Seberian über den Vox-Transmitter, was er angesichts deiner Neugier unternehmen soll. Der Lord Captain ist nicht geneigt, das lebhafte Interesse {mf|eines|einer} Fremden an seinem Lieblingsspielzeug zu tolerieren. Es werden Befehle erteilt, Schüsse abgefeuert und du wirst einmal mehr von der Vergessenheit verschlungen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}警備兵の不信感はすぐに疑念に変わっていく。数秒で、彼はヴォックス・キャスターを通して、あなたの異常な好奇心についてどうすればいいのかをシベリアに尋ねている。この玩具に強い興味を示す見知らぬ人を、ロード・キャプテンは容認する気はない。命令が下され、銃声が響き、あなたは再び忘却の彼方へ消えていく。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard's distrust is quickly replaced by suspicion. Within moments, he is asking Seberian over the vox-caster what to do about your inordinate curiosity. The Lord Captain is not inclined to tolerate a stranger showing such keen interest in his favourite toy. Orders are given, shots are fired, and you are swallowed by oblivion once more.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}警備兵の不信感はすぐに疑念に変わっていく。数秒で、彼はヴォックス・キャスターを通して、あなたの異常な好奇心についてどうすればいいのかをシベリアに尋ねている。この玩具に強い興味を示す見知らぬ人を、ロード・キャプテンは容認する気はない。命令が下され、銃声が響き、あなたは再び忘却の彼方へ消えていく。{/n}
